subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of Bahá! That celestial Joseph hath appeared in the divine Egypt; the market-place of the beloved ones hath been shattered by His beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غلام بها آن یوسف رحمانی در مصر ربانی جلوه نمود بازار دلبران از حسن درشکست
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
